case_title: JOSEPH GERARD ROMERO et al VS. ELVIN ERNESTO ESCOBAR

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ROMERO, JOSEPH GERARD ROMERO, MARINA ROSIBEL AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, ELVIN ERNESTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED JUN-01-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, ELVIN ERNESTO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMERO, JOSEPH GERARD ROMERO, MARINA ROSIBEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESCOBAR, ELVIN ERNESTO $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,605.00, DEFENDANT BREACHED LEASE BY NOT PAYING RENT AS AGREED. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS FILED BY ROMERO, JOSEPH GERARD
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: RUSSELL DAVIS. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
